aboutUs.valueCustomerFocusDesc: We always put our customers' needs first. Every feature we develop is designed to make everyday life easier for our salons.
aboutUs.valueInnovationDesc: We believe in continuous improvement. Technology evolves, and so do we. We listen to feedback and implement new solutions.
aboutUs.valuePartnershipDesc: We are not just a supplier – we are your partner. Your success is our success, and we work together to reach your goals.
aboutUs.valueSimplicityDesc: Complex problems require simple solutions. We design intuitive systems that anyone can use, regardless of technical background.
aboutUs.milestone2023: Stylora is founded with the vision of digitalizing the beauty industry
aboutUs.milestone2024Launch: Launch of the first version with booking, calendar and customer management
aboutUs.milestone2024Salons: Over 100 salons in Norway use Stylora daily
aboutUs.milestone2025: Expansion with payment integration, loyalty program and advanced reporting
aboutUs.heroParagraph1: Stylora started with a simple observation: Many Norwegian salons use overly complicated systems that steal time, create frustration and make the workday unnecessarily heavy. We wanted to do the opposite – to create a tool that brings calm, overview and flow.
aboutUs.heroParagraph2Prefix: The name Stylora was chosen because it combines two values we believe are fundamental to the industry:
aboutUs.heroParagraph2Suffix: "Style" represents beauty, precision and professional pride. The suffix "-ora" gives a soft, Nordic sound and signals calm and balance. Together they form a name that is both modern and timeless, easy to pronounce in several languages, and that reflects our ambition to create a system that feels natural in everyday Norwegian life.
aboutUs.heroParagraph3: Our story began by listening to salon owners: what holds them back, what do they miss, what do they spend too much time on? The answers were clear. They needed a solution that is easy to understand, pleasant to use and that actually helps them focus on what matters most – their customers.
aboutUs.heroParagraph4: That is why Stylora was developed with a Nordic, minimalist expression and features that make the workday easier, not heavier. Our goal is not just to deliver technology, but to create an experience that provides security, structure and professional flow.
aboutUs.heroParagraph5: Stylora is the result of a desire to simplify, improve and elevate the everyday lives of Norwegian salons – with a name that reflects exactly that.
aboutUs.visionText: To become Norway's leading platform for salon management, where every hairdresser, barber and beauty expert can focus on what they love – creating beautiful experiences for their customers – while we take care of the rest.
aboutUs.missionText: We simplify everyday life for Norwegian salons by offering intuitive, powerful tools that automate booking, customer management, payments and reporting – all in one platform.
aboutUs.valuesSubtitle: Our values guide everything we do – from product development to customer service
aboutUs.whyLanguageText: Everything in Norwegian (Bokmål), with Norwegian kroner, VAT handling and integration with Norwegian payment solutions like Vipps.
aboutUs.whyGdprText: All data is stored securely on EU servers in compliance with GDPR and Norwegian privacy legislation.
aboutUs.whySupportText: We speak your language and understand your business. Our support team is available in Norwegian during Norwegian working hours.
aboutUs.whyNoLockInText: We believe you should choose us because we are the best, not because you are locked in. No lock-in period or hidden costs.
aboutUs.ctaSubtitle: Join over 100 Norwegian salons that have already digitalized their business with Stylora
aboutUs.ctaFootnote: No credit card required • No lock-in period • Norwegian support

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.section1Body: We are the data controller for personal data we collect directly from you. For personal data that our customers (salons) register about their end customers, the salon is the data controller and we are the data processor.
privacy.section2Title: 2. What personal data do we collect?
privacy.section2_1Item2: Company information (company name, organization number, address)
privacy.section2_1Item5: Usage patterns and preferences in the service
privacy.section2_2Intro: Salons can register the following about their customers:
privacy.section4Intro: We only share personal data with third parties when necessary:
privacy.section4_1Note: All subprocessors are bound by data processing agreements and process data only on our instructions.
privacy.section4_2Body: We may disclose data if required by Norwegian law, a court decision or a public authority with legal basis.
privacy.retention1: As long as the account is active + 30 days
privacy.section7Intro: As a data subject you have the following rights:
privacy.rightAccessBody: You can request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.
privacy.rightRectificationBody: You can request that incorrect information be corrected.
privacy.rightErasureBody: You can request that your data be deleted ("the right to be forgotten").
privacy.rightPortabilityBody: You can request to receive your data in a machine-readable format.
privacy.rightObjectBody: You can object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.rightRestrictionBody: You can request that processing be restricted in certain cases.
privacy.section8Intro: We primarily store all data on servers in the EU/EEA. If data is transferred to countries outside the EU/EEA (e.g. when using certain cloud services), we ensure an adequate level of protection through:
privacy.section8Item1: The EU Commission's standard contractual clauses (SCCs)
privacy.section8Item3: Adequacy decisions from the EU Commission
privacy.section9Intro: We use the following types of cookies:
privacy.section9Note: We do not use cookies for advertising or cross-site tracking.
privacy.section10Body: We may update this privacy policy as needed. Significant changes are notified by email and/or in the service at least 30 days before they take effect. We encourage you to review this page regularly.
privacy.section11Intro: If you believe that we process personal data in breach of data protection rules, you have the right to complain to the Norwegian Data Protection Authority:
privacy.section12Intro: For questions about privacy, contact us:

intro.before: These terms govern your use of Stylora, a cloud-based salon management software provided by
intro.after: (org. no. 936 300 278). By creating an account or using the service, you accept these terms in their entirety.

section1.heading: 1. Definitions
section1.serviceDef: refers to the Stylora platform, including all features, applications and associated services.
section1.userDef: refers to any person or entity that creates an account or uses the Service.
section1.subscriptionDef: refers to the paid access to the Service based on the selected price plan.
section1.customerDataDef: refers to all information that the User stores in the Service, including customer information, appointments and transactions.
section1.providerDef: refers to Nexify CRM Systems AS.

section2.heading: 2. Service description
section2.intro: Stylora is a cloud-based software (SaaS) that offers:
section2.item4: Point of sale (POS) and payment integration
section2.outro: The Provider reserves the right to change, update or remove features with reasonable notice to the User.

section3.heading: 3. Subscription and payment
section3.sub1Body: The Service is offered in various price plans as described on our website. Prices are stated in Norwegian kroner (NOK) and exclude value added tax (VAT) unless otherwise stated.
section3.sub2Body: New users can get access to a free 14-day trial period. After the trial period, an active subscription is required for continued use.
section3.sub3Body: The subscription is billed monthly or annually in advance, depending on the selected plan. Payment is made via the payment methods available in the Service.
section3.sub4Body: The Provider may change prices with a minimum of 30 days' written notice. Existing subscriptions are affected only at the next renewal period.

section4.heading: 4. Termination and refund
section4.sub1Body: The User may cancel the subscription at any time via the control panel or by contacting customer service. The cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
section4.sub2Body: There is no lock-in period on the subscription. The User can cancel at any time without extra costs.
section4.sub3Body: Prepaid amounts are not refunded upon cancellation in the middle of a billing period, unless otherwise agreed or required by applicable consumer legislation.
section4.sub4Body: Upon cancellation, the User has the right to export their data for 30 days after the cancellation date. After this period, the data is permanently deleted.

section5.heading: 5. User's obligations
section5.intro: By using the Service, the User undertakes to:
section5.item1: Provide correct and up-to-date information at registration
section5.item2: Keep login information confidential and secure
section5.item3: Not share account access with unauthorized persons
section5.item4: Comply with applicable laws and regulations, including privacy legislation (GDPR)
section5.item5: Not use the Service for illegal or harmful purposes
section5.item6: Not attempt to bypass security measures or technical limitations
section5.item7: Notify the Provider immediately upon suspicion of unauthorized access

section6.heading: 6. Privacy and data security
section6.introBefore: The processing of personal data is governed by our
section6.item1: Process all data in accordance with GDPR and Norwegian privacy legislation
section6.item2: Store data on secure servers within the EU/EEA
section6.item3: Implement technical and organizational security measures
section6.item4: Not share data with third parties without consent or legal basis
section6.item5: Notify of any security breaches within 72 hours

section7.heading: 7. Limitation of liability
section7.sub1Body: The Provider strives for 99.9% uptime but does not guarantee uninterrupted access. Planned maintenance is announced at least 24 hours in advance.
section7.sub2Body: The Provider's total liability is limited to the amount the User has paid for the Service over the last 12 months. The Provider is not liable for:
section7.item1: Indirect losses, consequential damages or lost profits
section7.item2: Losses caused by the User's own negligence
section7.item3: Losses caused by third-party services (payment providers, SMS services, etc.)
section7.sub3Body: The Provider makes regular backups, but the User is encouraged to export important data regularly.

section8.heading: 8. Intellectual property rights
section8.body1: All intellectual property rights to the Service, including software, design, trademarks and documentation, belong to the Provider. The User receives a limited, non-exclusive license to use the Service during the subscription period.
section8.body2: The User retains all rights to their own data (Customer Data) stored in the Service.

section9.heading: 9. Suspension and termination
section9.intro: The Provider may suspend or terminate the User's access in the event of:
section9.item3: Illegal or harmful use of the Service
section9.outro: In the event of suspension, the User is given reasonable time to remedy the situation before any permanent termination.

section10.heading: 10. Changes to the terms
section10.body: The Provider may change these terms with a minimum of 30 days' notice. Significant changes are announced via email and/or within the Service. Continued use after the change takes effect is considered acceptance of the new terms.

section11.heading: 11. Governing law and dispute resolution
section11.body: These terms are subject to Norwegian law. Any disputes shall first be attempted resolved through negotiations. If agreement is not reached, the dispute shall be decided by the ordinary Norwegian courts with Oslo District Court as the venue.

section12.heading: 12. Contact information
section12.intro: For questions about these terms, contact us:

caseStudy.heroSubtitle: A modern beauty salon in Oslo transformed its business with Stylora – and doubled the number of online bookings in just 3 months
caseStudy.challengeQuote: "As the owner of a modern beauty salon, I felt we were falling behind. We still had a paper calendar, double bookings were common, and I spent hours every day confirming appointments. We needed a digital solution that fit our business."
caseStudy.statNoShowDesc: of customers did not show up for their appointment
caseStudy.solutionDescription: In March 2024, Studio Bella took the step and switched to Stylora. The implementation took just one day, and they saw results already after the first week.
caseStudy.resultsSubtitle: The numbers speak for themselves – dramatic improvement across all key metrics
caseStudy.testimonialQuote: "Stylora has completely transformed how we run the salon. We have more time for what we love – working with our customers – and less time on paperwork. The best investment we have made."
caseStudy.ctaTitle: Ready to get the same results?
caseStudy.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of Norwegian salons that have already transformed their business with Stylora

hero.subheadline: Stylora is the complete management system for modern salons. Appointment book, online booking, payment and insights – all in one elegant solution. Designed for Norwegian hair salons, barbershops and beauty salons that want to grow.

calendar.title: Smart Appointment Book
calendar.description: Intelligent calendar that understands your business. Automatic scheduling, no double bookings, and full control over all appointments.

onlineBooking.title: 24/7 Online Booking
onlineBooking.description: Your customers book whenever it suits them – even while you sleep. Automatic confirmations and reminders keep your calendar full.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders
reminders.description: Automatic SMS alerts 24 and 2 hours before the appointment. Our customers report up to 80% reduction in no-shows.

payment.title: Easy Payment
payment.description: Integration with Vipps and card terminals. Get paid quickly, and keep track of all revenue in one place.

customers.title: Complete Customer Register
customers.description: Everything you need to know about your customers. Visit history, preferences, notes and GDPR-compliant data processing.

analytics.title: Powerful Analytics
analytics.description: Revenue, trends and employee performance – all visualized and easy to understand. Make data-driven decisions that increase profitability.

featuresSection.title: Everything you need in one solution
featuresSection.subtitle: Powerful tools designed to make your everyday easier

testimonialsSection.title: What our customers say
testimonialsSection.subtitle: Join the family of satisfied salons all over Norway

maria.content: Stylora has transformed how we run the salon. We save 5+ hours every week on administration, and customers love how easy it is to book an appointment!

hassan.content: Finally a system that understands Norwegian salons. The SMS reminders have reduced no-shows by 75%, and the reports give us insights we've never had before!

linda.content: Incredibly intuitive! The whole team was up and running in under 10 minutes. Stylora has made us more professional and efficient – customers notice the difference.

pricingSection.title: Simple and transparent pricing
pricingSection.subtitle: Choose the plan that suits your salon. No hidden costs.
pricingSection.trialNote: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

start.description: Perfect for individuals and small salons

pro.description: For growing salons with several employees

faqSection.title: Frequently asked questions
faqSection.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Stylora

technical.question: Do I need to be technical to use Stylora?
technical.answer: No, absolutely not. Stylora is designed with simplicity in focus. You need no technical experience – the system is intuitive and self-explanatory. We guide you through the setup, and most salons are up and running in under 10 minutes.

accountant.question: Does this work with an accountant?
accountant.answer: Yes! Stylora exports all sales data in formats compatible with Norwegian accounting systems. You can easily share reports with your accountant, and all VAT is automatically calculated according to Norwegian rules. Perfect for year-end accounts and audits.

vipps.question: Do you support Vipps?
vipps.answer: Vipps integration is planned and coming soon. Right now we support card payment via Stripe, as well as manual registration of cash and Vipps payments at the till.

gdpr.question: What about GDPR and privacy?
gdpr.answer: Stylora is fully GDPR-compliant and takes privacy seriously. We store only necessary information, all data is encrypted, and your customers have full control. They can request access to or deletion of their data at any time. Safe for you and your customers.

logins.question: Can employees have their own logins?
logins.answer: Yes! Each employee gets their own login with customized permissions based on role. They can see their schedule, register sales, get an overview of commission, and much more. Full control and overview for everyone.

trial.question: Can I try before I buy?
trial.answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial without a credit card. You get full access to all features and can test Stylora thoroughly with your own data. No commitments, no hidden costs.

finalCta.badge: Ready to take your salon to the next level?
finalCta.title: Start your free trial today
finalCta.subtitle: Join 5000+ satisfied salons already using Stylora. No credit card required.
